pageContext.name: Claire Redfield (Classic Version)
pageContext.description: NAUTS and DAMTOYS are proud to team up to deliver the Claire Redfield (Classic Version) Sixth Scale Collectible Figure from the popular CAPCOM game RESIDENT EVIL 2!  This classic edition of the Claire Redfield figure features a highly detailed and posable body with over 30 points of articulation, allowing fans to recreate their favorite moments from the cult-classic survival horror game. A fully fabricated costume lets you model Claire as seen in the original 1998 version as well as the 2019 remake, and an unbelievable array of weapons and accessories make this one video game figure you don't want to miss out on!  Resident Evil collectibles fans, try to escape Raccoon city with the help of Claire Redfield, and add to your horror collection today!
